user.title: HA Cloud CN
user.description: Enter the backend URL and bind code to automatically configure the tunnel.

error.bind_failed: Bind failed: please check whether the bind code is expired and the backend URL is reachable.
error.proxy_misconfigured: Bind failed HTTP 405: reverse proxy misconfigured, /prod-api/* requests not forwarded to backend API. Check Caddy/Nginx config.
